title: An Act discouraging employers from closing call centers and customer service operations in the Commonwealth and relocating overseas, and for other purposes

abstracts.abstract: By Mr. Feeney, a petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 2142) of Paul R. Feeney for legislation to discourage employers from closing call centers and customer service operations in the Commonwealth and relocating overseas, and for other purposes.  State Administration and Regulatory Oversight.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight

related_entities.name: committee on State Administration and Regulatory Oversight

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 07/22/2025 from 10:00 AM-01:00 PM in A-1
